      "assistant": {
        "ToolUse": {
          "message_id": "8066aeee-fd3e-4704-86f1-7db09f9df10e",
          "content": "Now add a heart emoji per theme and update it in `applyTheme`:",
          "tool_uses": [
            {
              "id": "tooluse_1M3MvNPuWJ0ezN6GbkzFy1",
              "name": "fs_write",
              "orig_name": "fs_write",
              "args": {
                "command": "str_replace",
                "new_str": "  const themeHearts = {\n    'Sky Blue':'💙','Rose Pink':'💗','Lavender':'💜','Mint Green':'💚','Sunset':'🧡','Cherry Red':'❤️'\n  };\n\n  function applyTheme(name) {\n    const t = themes[name]; if (!t) return;\n    const r = document.documentElement.style;\n    Object.keys(t).forEach(k => { if (k !== 'swatch') r.setProperty('--' + k, t[k]); });\n    localStorage.setItem('theme', name);\n    document.querySelectorAll('.palette-option').forEach(el => el.classList.toggle('active', el.dataset.name === name));\n    updateFloats(name);\n    document.getElementById('titleHeart').textContent = themeHearts[name] || '💙';\n  }",
                "old_str": "  function applyTheme(name) {\n    const t = themes[name]; if (!t) return;\n    const r = document.documentElement.style;\n    Object.keys(t).forEach(k => { if (k !== 'swatch') r.setProperty('--' + k, t[k]); });\n    localStorage.setItem('theme', name);\n    document.querySelectorAll('.palette-option').forEach(el => el.classList.toggle('active', el.dataset.name === name));\n    updateFloats(name);\n  }",
                "path": "/Users/erwin.c/Downloads/love-site/index.html"
              },
              "orig_args": {
                "command": "str_replace",
                "new_str": "  const themeHearts = {\n    'Sky Blue':'💙','Rose Pink':'💗','Lavender':'💜','Mint Green':'💚','Sunset':'🧡','Cherry Red':'❤️'\n  };\n\n  function applyTheme(name) {\n    const t = themes[name]; if (!t) return;\n    const r = document.documentElement.style;\n    Object.keys(t).forEach(k => { if (k !== 'swatch') r.setProperty('--' + k, t[k]); });\n    localStorage.setItem('theme', name);\n    document.querySelectorAll('.palette-option').forEach(el => el.classList.toggle('active', el.dataset.name === name));\n    updateFloats(name);\n    document.getElementById('titleHeart').textContent = themeHearts[name] || '💙';\n  }",
                "old_str": "  function applyTheme(name) {\n    const t = themes[name]; if (!t) return;\n    const r = document.documentElement.style;\n    Object.keys(t).forEach(k => { if (k !== 'swatch') r.setProperty('--' + k, t[k]); });\n    localStorage.setItem('theme', name);\n    document.querySelectorAll('.palette-option').forEach(el => el.classList.toggle('active', el.dataset.name === name));\n    updateFloats(name);\n  }",
                "path": "/Users/erwin.c/Downloads/love-site/index.html"

          "content": "Done! Now when you switch themes, the heart changes everywhere:\n\n- Header: \"Kirsty & Jet 💗\" / \"Kirsty & Jet 💜\" etc.\n- Footer: \"Made with 💚\" etc.\n- Browser tab title updates too\n\nEverything's fully synced with the theme now. Refresh and try it!"

      "assistant": {
        "ToolUse": {
          "message_id": "be62e9a7-fa0e-431d-9a66-0b4a503e8ed3",
          "content": "First add the calendar styles, then the HTML section, then the script:",
          "tool_uses": [
            {
              "id": "tooluse_IzQTc82bbqQrKOaB5cef2l",
              "name": "fs_write",
              "orig_name": "fs_write",
              "args": {
                "command": "str_replace",
                "new_str": "    /* calendar */\n    .calendar-nav { display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; }\n    .calendar-nav button {\n      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-dark)); color: #fff;\n      border: none; width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; font-size: 1.1rem; cursor: pointer;\n    }\n    .calendar-nav span { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 600; min-width: 160px; text-align: center; }\n    .calendar-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(7,1fr); gap: 4px; text-align: center; }\n    .calendar-grid .day-label { font-size: .75rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--subtitle); padding: .3rem 0; }\n    .calendar-grid .day {\n      padding: .4rem; border-radius: 10px; font-size: .85rem; cursor: pointer;\n      transition: background .2s; position: relative; min-height: 38px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;\n    }\n    .calendar-grid .day:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,.06); }\n    .calendar-grid .day.today { font-weight: 700; outline: 2px solid var(--accent); border-radius: 10px; }\n    .calendar-grid .day.has-event { background: var(--tag1); font-weight: 600; }\n    .calendar-grid .day.has-event::after {\n      content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 4px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);\n      width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--accent-dark);\n    }\n    .calendar-grid .day.empty { cursor: default; }\n    .event-list { margin-top: 1rem; }\n    .event-list h3 { font-size: .95rem; color: var(--heading); margin-bottom: .4rem; }\n    .event-item {\n      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .5rem; padding: .35rem 0;\n      border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--border); font-size: .9rem;\n    }\n    .event-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }\n    .add-event { display: flex; gap: .5rem; margin-top: .8rem; }\n    .add-event input {\n      flex: 1; padding: .4rem .7rem; border: 2px solid var(--border); border-radius: 50px;\n      font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; font-size: .85rem; outline: none;\n    }\n    .add-event input:focus { border-color: var(--accent); }\n    .add-event button {\n      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-dark)); color: #fff; border: none;\n      padding: .4rem 1rem; border-radius: 50px; font-size: .85rem; cursor: pointer;\n      font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; font-weight: 600;\n    }\n\n    .sparkle {",
                "old_str": "    .sparkle {",
                "path": "/Users/erwin.c/Downloads/love-site/index.html"
              },
              "orig_args": {

                "command": "str_replace",
                "new_str": "  </section>\n\n  <section>\n    <h2>Our Calendar 📅</h2>\n    <div class=\"calendar-nav\">\n      <button onclick=\"changeMonth(-1)\">‹</button>\n      <span id=\"calMonth\"></span>\n      <button onclick=\"changeMonth(1)\">›</button>\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"calendar-grid\" id=\"calGrid\"></div>\n    <div class=\"event-list\" id=\"eventList\"></div>\n    <div class=\"add-event\">\n      <input type=\"text\" id=\"newEvent\" placeholder=\"Add a date or event...\">\n      <button onclick=\"addEvent()\">Add 📅</button>\n    </div>\n  </section>\n\n  <footer>",
                "old_str": "  </section>\n\n  <footer>",
                "path": "/Users/erwin.c/Downloads/love-site/index.html"
              },

                "new_str": "  renderBucket();\n\n  // calendar\n  let calDate = new Date();\n  let selectedDate = null;\n  let calEvents = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('calEvents')) || {};\n  function saveEvents() { localStorage.setItem('calEvents', JSON.stringify(calEvents)); }\n\n  function renderCal() {\n    const y = calDate.getFullYear(), m = calDate.getMonth();\n    document.getElementById('calMonth').textContent = calDate.toLocaleString('default',{month:'long',year:'numeric'});\n    const grid = document.getElementById('calGrid');\n    grid.innerHTML = '';\n    ['Sun','Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat'].forEach(d => {\n      const el = document.createElement('div'); el.className = 'day-label'; el.textContent = d; grid.appendChild(el);\n    });\n    const first = new Date(y,m,1).getDay(), days = new Date(y,m+1,0).getDate();\n    const today = new Date();\n    for (let i = 0; i < first; i++) { const el = document.createElement('div'); el.className = 'day empty'; grid.appendChild(el); }\n    for (let d = 1; d <= days; d++) {\n      const el = document.createElement('div');\n      const key = `${y}-${String(m+1).padStart(2,'0')}-${String(d).padStart(2,'0')}`;\n      el.className = 'day';\n      if (d === today.getDate() && m === today.getMonth() && y === today.getFullYear()) el.classList.add('today');\n      if (calEvents[key]?.length) el.classList.add('has-event');\n      el.textContent = d;\n      el.onclick = () => { selectedDate = key; renderEvents(); };\n      grid.appendChild(el);\n    }\n    if (selectedDate) renderEvents();\n  }\n\n  function renderEvents() {\n    const el = document.getElementById('eventList');\n    if (!selectedDate) { el.innerHTML = ''; return; }\n    const evts = calEvents[selectedDate] || [];\n    el.innerHTML = `<h3>${selectedDate}</h3>` +\n      (evts.length ? evts.map((e,i) => `<div class=\"event-item\"><span>${e}</span><button class=\"action-btn\" onclick=\"deleteEvent('${selectedDate}',${i})\" title=\"Delete\">🗑️</button></div>`).join('') : '<div style=\"font-size:.85rem;opacity:.6\">No events yet</div>');\n  }\n\n  function addEvent() {\n    if (!selectedDate) { alert('Pick a date on the calendar first!'); return; }\n    const input = document.getElementById('newEvent');\n    const text = input.value.trim();\n    if (!text) return;\n    if (!calEvents[selectedDate]) calEvents[selectedDate] = [];\n    calEvents[selectedDate].push(text);\n    input.value = '';\n    saveEvents(); renderCal();\n  }\n  document.getElementById('newEvent').addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') addEvent(); });\n\n  function deleteEvent(key, i) {\n    calEvents[key].splice(i, 1);\n    if (!calEvents[key].length) delete calEvents[key];\n    saveEvents(); renderCal();\n  }\n\n  function changeMonth(dir) { calDate.setMonth(calDate.getMonth() + dir); selectedDate = null; renderCal(); }\n  renderCal();\n\n  // cursor sparkle effect",
                "old_str": "  renderBucket();\n\n  // cursor sparkle effect",
                "path": "/Users/erwin.c/Downloads/love-site/index.html"
              },
              "orig_args": {
                "command": "str_replace",
                "new_str": "  renderBucket();\n\n  // calendar\n  let calDate = new Date();\n  let selectedDate = null;\n  let calEvents = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('calEvents')) || {};\n  function saveEvents() { localStorage.setItem('calEvents', JSON.stringify(calEvents)); }\n\n  function renderCal() {\n    const y = calDate.getFullYear(), m = calDate.getMonth();\n    document.getElementById('calMonth').textContent = calDate.toLocaleString('default',{month:'long',year:'numeric'});\n    const grid = document.getElementById('calGrid');\n    grid.innerHTML = '';\n    ['Sun','Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat'].forEach(d => {\n      const el = document.createElement('div'); el.className = 'day-label'; el.textContent = d; grid.appendChild(el);\n    });\n    const first = new Date(y,m,1).getDay(), days = new Date(y,m+1,0).getDate();\n    const today = new Date();\n    for (let i = 0; i < first; i++) { const el = document.createElement('div'); el.className = 'day empty'; grid.appendChild(el); }\n    for (let d = 1; d <= days; d++) {\n      const el = document.createElement('div');\n      const key = `${y}-${String(m+1).padStart(2,'0')}-${String(d).padStart(2,'0')}`;\n      el.className = 'day';\n      if (d === today.getDate() && m === today.getMonth() && y === today.getFullYear()) el.classList.add('today');\n      if (calEvents[key]?.length) el.classList.add('has-event');\n      el.textContent = d;\n      el.onclick = () => { selectedDate = key; renderEvents(); };\n      grid.appendChild(el);\n    }\n    if (selectedDate) renderEvents();\n  }\n\n  function renderEvents() {\n    const el = document.getElementById('eventList');\n    if (!selectedDate) { el.innerHTML = ''; return; }\n    const evts = calEvents[selectedDate] || [];\n    el.innerHTML = `<h3>${selectedDate}</h3>` +\n      (evts.length ? evts.map((e,i) => `<div class=\"event-item\"><span>${e}</span><button class=\"action-btn\" onclick=\"deleteEvent('${selectedDate}',${i})\" title=\"Delete\">🗑️</button></div>`).join('') : '<div style=\"font-size:.85rem;opacity:.6\">No events yet</div>');\n  }\n\n  function addEvent() {\n    if (!selectedDate) { alert('Pick a date on the calendar first!'); return; }\n    const input = document.getElementById('newEvent');\n    const text = input.value.trim();\n    if (!text) return;\n    if (!calEvents[selectedDate]) calEvents[selectedDate] = [];\n    calEvents[selectedDate].push(text);\n    input.value = '';\n    saveEvents(); renderCal();\n  }\n  document.getElementById('newEvent').addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') addEvent(); });\n\n  function deleteEvent(key, i) {\n    calEvents[key].splice(i, 1);\n    if (!calEvents[key].length) delete calEvents[key];\n    saveEvents(); renderCal();\n  }\n\n  function changeMonth(dir) { calDate.setMonth(calDate.getMonth() + dir); selectedDate = null; renderCal(); }\n  renderCal();\n\n  // cursor sparkle effect",
                "old_str": "  renderBucket();\n\n  // cursor sparkle effect",
                "path": "/Users/erwin.c/Downloads/love-site/index.html"
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      },

          "message_id": "757d02b4-a9f1-45c0-902d-ef99b85486a0",
          "content": "Done! You now have an \"Our Calendar 📅\" section with:\n\n- ‹ › arrows to navigate months\n- Click any date to select it\n- Today's date is highlighted with an outline\n- Dates with events show a colored dot\n- Add events by selecting a date, typing in the input, and hitting \"Add 📅\" or Enter\n- 🗑️ button to remove events\n- Everything saves to localStorage\n\nRefresh and try clicking on a date then adding an event! Perfect for anniversaries, date nights, and sponty events 😄"
        }
      },

                  {
                    "Text": "<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head>\n  <meta charset=\"UTF-8\">\n  <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\">\n  <title>Kirsty & Jet 💙</title>\n  <style>\n    @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Dancing+Script:wght@500;700&family=Quicksand:wght@400;600&display=swap');\n\n    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }\n\n    :root {\n      --bg1: #e0f2f7; --bg2: #87ceeb; --bg3: #5dade2;\n      --title: #1976d2; --subtitle: #3a7ca5; --text: #1a3a4a;\n      --heading: #1565c0;\n      --tag1: #b3e5fc; --tag2: #4fc3f7; --tag-hover: #1e88e5;\n      --accent: #42a5f5; --accent-dark: #1976d2;\n      --border: #87ceeb;\n    }\n\n    body {\n      font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif;\n      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--bg1), var(--bg2), var(--bg3));\n      min-height: 100vh;\n      color: var(--text);\n      overflow-x: hidden;\n    }\n\n    /* floating hearts */\n    .hearts { position: fixed; width: 100%; height: 100%; pointer-events: none; z-index: 0; overflow: hidden; }\n    .heart {\n      position: absolute;\n      font-size: 1.4rem;\n      opacity: 0.25;\n      animation: floatUp linear infinite;\n    }\n    @keyframes floatUp {\n      0% { transform: translateY(100vh) rotate(0deg); opacity: 0.25; }\n      100% { transform: translateY(-10vh) rotate(360deg); opacity: 0; }\n    }\n\n    .container { position: relative; z-index: 1; max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 2rem 1.2rem 4rem; }\n\n    header {\n      text-align: center;\n      padding: 3rem 0 2rem;\n    }\n    header h1 {\n      font-family: 'Dancing Script', cursive;\n      font-size: 3.2rem;\n      color: var(--title);\n      text-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(25,118,210,.15);\n    }\n    header p { margin-top: .5rem; font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--subtitle); }\n\n    section {\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.2);\n      backdrop-filter: blur(16px);\n      -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px);\n      border-radius: 20px;\n      padding: 2rem;\n      margin: 1.8rem 0;\n      box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.08);\n      border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.4);\n    }\n    section h2 {\n      font-family: 'Dancing Script', cursive;\n      font-size: 2rem;\n      color: var(--heading);\n      margin-bottom: 1rem;\n      text-align: center;\n    }\n\n    .tags {\n      display: flex;\n      flex-wrap: wrap;\n      gap: .6rem;\n      justify-content: center;\n    }\n    .tag {\n      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--tag1), var(--tag2));\n      color: #fff;\n      padding: .5rem 1.2rem;\n      border-radius: 50px;\n      font-size: .95rem;\n      font-weight: 600;\n      cursor: default;\n      transition: transform .25s, box-shadow .25s, background .3s;\n    }\n    .tag:hover {\n      transform: scale(1.12) translateY(-3px);\n      box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.15);\n      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--tag2), var(--tag-hover));\n    }\n\n    .bucket-list { list-style: none; }\n    .bucket-list li {\n      padding: .7rem 0;\n      border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--border);\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      gap: .6rem;\n      font-size: 1.05rem;\n    }\n    .bucket-list li:last-child { border-bottom: none; }\n    .bucket-list .heart-btn {\n      background: none; border: none; font-size: 1.3rem; cursor: pointer; transition: transform .2s;\n    }\n    .bucket-list .heart-btn:hover { transform: scale(1.3); }\n    .bucket-list .action-btn {\n      background: none; border: none; font-size: 1rem; cursor: pointer; opacity: .5; transition: opacity .2s;\n    }\n    .bucket-list .action-btn:hover { opacity: 1; }\n    .bucket-list li.done span { text-decoration: line-through; opacity: .5; }\n    .add-item {\n      display: flex; gap: .5rem; margin-top: 1rem;\n    }\n    .add-item input {\n      flex: 1; padding: .5rem .8rem; border: 2px solid var(--border); border-radius: 50px;\n      font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; font-size: .95rem; outline: none;\n    }\n    .add-item input:focus { border-color: var(--accent); }\n    .add-item button {\n      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-dark)); color: #fff; border: none;\n      padding: .5rem 1.2rem; border-radius: 50px; font-size: .95rem; cursor: pointer;\n      font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; font-weight: 600;\n    }\n\n    /* music control */\n    .music-btn {\n      position: fixed;\n      bottom: 1.5rem;\n      right: 1.5rem;\n      width: 52px;\n      height: 52px;\n      border-radius: 50%;\n      border: none;\n      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-dark));\n      color: #fff;\n      font-size: 1.5rem;\n      cursor: pointer;\n      box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.2);\n      z-index: 10;\n      transition: transform .2s;\n    }\n    .music-btn:hover { transform: scale(1.1); }\n\n    /* palette picker */\n    .palette-btn {\n      position: fixed; bottom: 1.5rem; left: 1.5rem;\n      width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 50%; border: none;\n      background: conic-gradient(#e91e63,#ff9800,#4caf50,#2196f3,#9c27b0,#e91e63);\n      font-size: 1.5rem; cursor: pointer;\n      box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.2);\n      z-index: 10; transition: transform .2s;\n    }\n    .palette-btn:hover { transform: scale(1.1); }\n    .palette-panel {\n      position: fixed; bottom: 5rem; left: 1.5rem;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.92); backdrop-filter: blur(10px);\n      border-radius: 16px; padding: .8rem;\n      box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.15);\n      z-index: 10; display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: .3rem;\n    }\n    .palette-panel.open { display: flex; }\n    .palette-option {\n      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .5rem;\n      padding: .45rem .7rem; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer;\n      border: 2px solid transparent; transition: border-color .2s; background: none;\n      font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; font-size: .9rem; font-weight: 600;\n    }\n    .palette-option:hover { border-color: #aaa; }\n    .palette-option.active { border-color: #333; }\n    .palette-swatch {\n      width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid rgba(0,0,0,.1); flex-shrink: 0;\n    }\n\n    footer { text-align: center; padding: 2rem 0 1rem; font-size: .9rem; color: var(--title); }\n    @media (max-width: 600px) {\n      header h1 { font-size: 2.2rem; }\n      section { padding: 1.4rem; margin: 1.2rem 0; }\n      section h2 { font-size: 1.5rem; }\n      .tag { font-size: .85rem; padding: .4rem .9rem; }\n      .container { padding: 1rem .8rem 3rem; }\n    }\n\n    /* calendar */\n    .calendar-nav { display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; }\n    .calendar-nav button {\n      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-dark)); color: #fff;\n      border: none; width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; font-size: 1.1rem; cursor: pointer;\n    }\n    .calendar-nav span { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 600; min-width: 160px; text-align: center; }\n    .calendar-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(7,1fr); gap: 4px; text-align: center; }\n    .calendar-grid .day-label { font-size: .75rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--subtitle); padding: .3rem 0; }\n    .calendar-grid .day {\n      padding: .4rem; border-radius: 10px; font-size: .85rem; cursor: pointer;\n      transition: background .2s; position: relative; min-height: 38px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;\n    }\n    .calendar-grid .day:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,.06); }\n    .calendar-grid .day.today { font-weight: 700; outline: 2px solid var(--accent); border-radius: 10px; }\n    .calendar-grid .day.has-event { background: var(--tag1); font-weight: 600; }\n    .calendar-grid .day.has-event::after {\n      content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 4px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);\n      width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--accent-dark);\n    }\n    .calendar-grid .day.empty { cursor: default; }\n    .event-list { margin-top: 1rem; }\n    .event-list h3 { font-size: .95rem; color: var(--heading); margin-bottom: .4rem; }\n    .event-item {\n      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .5rem; padding: .35rem 0;\n      border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--border); font-size: .9rem;\n    }\n    .event-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }\n    .add-event { display: flex; gap: .5rem; margin-top: .8rem; }\n    .add-event input {\n      flex: 1; padding: .4rem .7rem; border: 2px solid var(--border); border-radius: 50px;\n      font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; font-size: .85rem; outline: none;\n    }\n    .add-event input:focus { border-color: var(--accent); }\n    .add-event button {\n      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-dark)); color: #fff; border: none;\n      padding: .4rem 1rem; border-radius: 50px; font-size: .85rem; cursor: pointer;\n      font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; font-weight: 600;\n    }\n\n    .sparkle {\n      position: absolute;\n      pointer-events: none;\n      font-size: 1rem;\n      z-index: 99;\n      animation: sparkleFade .8s ease-out forwards;\n    }\n    @keyframes sparkleFade {\n      0% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1) translate(0,0); }\n      100% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0) translate(0,-30px); }\n    }\n  </style>\n</head>\n<body>\n\n<div class=\"hearts\" id=\"hearts\"></div>\n\n<div class=\"container\">\n  <header>\n    <h1>Kirsty & Jet <span id=\"titleHeart\">💙</span></h1>\n    <p>A little corner of the internet, just for us.</p>\n  </header>\n\n  <!-- ✏️ EDIT: Add or remove your shared interests here -->\n  <section>\n    <h2>Our Interests 🌸</h2>\n    <div class=\"tags\">\n      <span class=\"tag\">🎬 Movies</span>\n      <span class=\"tag\">🍜 Food Trips</span>\n      <span class=\"tag\">🎵 Music</span>\n      <span class=\"tag\">📸 Photography</span>\n      <span class=\"tag\">🎮 Gaming</span>\n      <span class=\"tag\">☕ Coffee Dates</span>\n      <span class=\"tag\">🌅 Sunsets</span>\n      <span class=\"tag\">📚 Reading</span>\n      <span class=\"tag\">🌃 City Lights</span>\n      <span class=\"tag\">🎉 Sponty Events</span>\n      <span class=\"tag\">🚗 Roadtrips</span>\n    </div>\n  </section>\n\n  <!-- ✏️ Bucket list: click hearts to mark done, add new items below -->\n  <section>\n    <h2>Our Bucket List 🪣✨</h2>\n    <ul class=\"bucket-list\" id=\"bucketList\"></ul>\n    <div class=\"add-item\">\n      <input type=\"text\" id=\"newItem\" placeholder=\"Add a new dream...\">\n      <button onclick=\"addItem()\" id=\"addBucketBtn\">Add 💙</button>\n    </div>\n  </section>\n\n  <section>\n    <h2>Our Calendar 📅</h2>\n    <div class=\"calendar-nav\">\n      <button onclick=\"changeMonth(-1)\">‹</button>\n      <span id=\"calMonth\"></span>\n      <button onclick=\"changeMonth(1)\">›</button>\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"calendar-grid\" id=\"calGrid\"></div>\n    <div class=\"event-list\" id=\"eventList\"></div>\n    <div class=\"add-event\">\n      <input type=\"text\" id=\"newEvent\" placeholder=\"Add a date or event...\">\n      <button onclick=\"addEvent()\" id=\"addEventBtn\">Add 📅</button>\n    </div>\n  </section>\n\n  <footer>Made with <span id=\"footerHeart\">💙</span></footer>\n</div>\n\n<!-- 🎵 MUSIC: Replace \"music.mp3\" with your audio file name -->\n<audio id=\"bgMusic\" loop>\n  <source src=\"music.mp3\" type=\"audio/mpeg\">\n</audio>\n<button class=\"music-btn\" id=\"musicBtn\" title=\"Play/Pause Music\">🎵</button>\n\n<button class=\"palette-btn\" id=\"paletteBtn\" title=\"Change Theme\">🎨</button>\n<div class=\"palette-panel\" id=\"palettePanel\"></div>\n\n<script>\n  // theme-specific emojis\n  const themeEmojis = {\n    'Sky Blue':   { sparkles: ['💙','✨','🩵','⭐'], floats: ['💙','🩵','💎','🫧','☁️'] },\n    'Rose Pink':  { sparkles: ['💗','✨','💕','⭐'], floats: ['💕','💗','💖','♥','🩷'] },\n    'Lavender':   { sparkles: ['💜','✨','🔮','⭐'], floats: ['💜','🪻','🔮','☁️','✨'] },\n    'Mint Green': { sparkles: ['💚','✨','🍀','⭐'], floats: ['💚','🌿','🍃','🌱','✨'] },\n    'Sunset':     { sparkles: ['🧡','✨','🌟','⭐'], floats: ['🧡','🌅','☀️','✨','🌻'] },\n    'Cherry Red': { sparkles: ['❤️','✨','♥','⭐'], floats: ['❤️','♥','🌹','✨','❣️'] },\n  };\n  let currentSparkles = themeEmojis['Sky Blue'].sparkles;\n\n  // floating hearts\n  const container = document.getElementById('hearts');\n  function updateFloats(name) {\n    const e = themeEmojis[name]?.floats || themeEmojis['Sky Blue'].floats;\n    container.querySelectorAll('.heart').forEach((h, i) => h.textContent = e[i % e.length]);\n    currentSparkles = themeEmojis[name]?.sparkles || themeEmojis['Sky Blue'].sparkles;\n  }\n  const defaultFloats = themeEmojis['Sky Blue'].floats;\n  for (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) {\n    const s = document.createElement('span');\n    s.className = 'heart';\n    s.textContent = defaultFloats[i % defaultFloats.length];\n    s.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + '%';\n    s.style.animationDuration = 6 + Math.random() * 8 + 's';\n    s.style.animationDelay = Math.random() * 10 + 's';\n    container.appendChild(s);\n  }\n\n  // bucket list with localStorage\n  const defaults = [\n    'Watch the Northern Lights together',\n    'Travel to Japan during cherry blossom season',\n    'Learn to cook a new dish every month',\n    'Go stargazing in the mountains',\n    'Build a blanket fort and binge-watch our fave series',\n    'Ride a hot air balloon',\n    'Write letters to our future selves',\n    'Adopt a pet together'\n  ];\n  let bucketData = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('bucketList')) ||\n    defaults.map(t => ({ text: t, done: false }));\n\n  function saveBucket() { localStorage.setItem('bucketList', JSON.stringify(bucketData)); }\n\n  function renderBucket() {\n    const ul = document.getElementById('bucketList');\n    ul.innerHTML = '';\n    bucketData.forEach((item, i) => {\n      const li = document.createElement('li');\n      if (item.done) li.classList.add('done');\n      li.innerHTML = `<button class=\"heart-btn\" onclick=\"toggleDone(${i})\">${item.done ? '❤️' : '🤍'}</button><span>${item.text}</span><button class=\"action-btn\" onclick=\"editItem(${i})\" title=\"Edit\">✏️</button><button class=\"action-btn\" onclick=\"deleteItem(${i})\" title=\"Delete\">🗑️</button>`;\n      ul.appendChild(li);\n    });\n  }\n\n  function toggleDone(i) {\n    bucketData[i].done = !bucketData[i].done;\n    saveBucket(); renderBucket();\n  }\n\n  function addItem() {\n    const input = document.getElementById('newItem');\n    const text = input.value.trim();\n    if (!text) return;\n    bucketData.push({ text, done: false });\n    input.value = '';\n    saveBucket(); renderBucket();\n  }\n  document.getElementById('newItem').addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') addItem(); });\n\n  function editItem(i) {\n    const newText = prompt('Edit this dream:', bucketData[i].text);\n    if (newText !== null && newText.trim()) {\n      bucketData[i].text = newText.trim();\n      saveBucket(); renderBucket();\n    }\n  }\n\n  function deleteItem(i) {\n    if (confirm('Remove \"' + bucketData[i].text + '\" from the list?')) {\n      bucketData.splice(i, 1);\n      saveBucket(); renderBucket();\n    }\n  }\n\n  renderBucket();\n\n  // calendar\n  let calDate = new Date();\n  let selectedDate = null;\n  let calEvents = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('calEvents')) || {};\n  function saveEvents() { localStorage.setItem('calEvents', JSON.stringify(calEvents)); }\n\n  function renderCal() {\n    const y = calDate.getFullYear(), m = calDate.getMonth();\n    document.getElementById('calMonth').textContent = calDate.toLocaleString('default',{month:'long',year:'numeric'});\n    const grid = document.getElementById('calGrid');\n    grid.innerHTML = '';\n    ['Sun','Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat'].forEach(d => {\n      const el = document.createElement('div'); el.className = 'day-label'; el.textContent = d; grid.appendChild(el);\n    });\n    const first = new Date(y,m,1).getDay(), days = new Date(y,m+1,0).getDate();\n    const today = new Date();\n    for (let i = 0; i < first; i++) { const el = document.createElement('div'); el.className = 'day empty'; grid.appendChild(el); }\n    for (let d = 1; d <= days; d++) {\n      const el = document.createElement('div');\n      const key = `${y}-${String(m+1).padStart(2,'0')}-${String(d).padStart(2,'0')}`;\n      el.className = 'day';\n      if (d === today.getDate() && m === today.getMonth() && y === today.getFullYear()) el.classList.add('today');\n      if (calEvents[key]?.length) el.classList.add('has-event');\n      el.textContent = d;\n      el.onclick = () => { selectedDate = key; renderEvents(); };\n      grid.appendChild(el);\n    }\n    if (selectedDate) renderEvents();\n  }\n\n  function renderEvents() {\n    const el = document.getElementById('eventList');\n    if (!selectedDate) { el.innerHTML = ''; return; }\n    const evts = calEvents[selectedDate] || [];\n    el.innerHTML = `<h3>${selectedDate}</h3>` +\n      (evts.length ? evts.map((e,i) => `<div class=\"event-item\"><span>${e}</span><button class=\"action-btn\" onclick=\"deleteEvent('${selectedDate}',${i})\" title=\"Delete\">🗑️</button></div>`).join('') : '<div style=\"font-size:.85rem;opacity:.6\">No events yet</div>');\n  }\n\n  function addEvent() {\n    if (!selectedDate) { alert('Pick a date on the calendar first!'); return; }\n    const input = document.getElementById('newEvent');\n    const text = input.value.trim();\n    if (!text) return;\n    if (!calEvents[selectedDate]) calEvents[selectedDate] = [];\n    calEvents[selectedDate].push(text);\n    input.value = '';\n    saveEvents(); renderCal();\n  }\n  document.getElementById('newEvent').addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') addEvent(); });\n\n  function deleteEvent(key, i) {\n    calEvents[key].splice(i, 1);\n    if (!calEvents[key].length) delete calEvents[key];\n    saveEvents(); renderCal();\n  }\n\n  function changeMonth(dir) { calDate.setMonth(calDate.getMonth() + dir); selectedDate = null; renderCal(); }\n  renderCal();\n\n  // cursor sparkle effect\n  document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {\n    const s = document.createElement('span');\n    s.className = 'sparkle';\n    s.textContent = currentSparkles[Math.random() * 4 | 0];\n    s.style.left = e.pageX + 'px';\n    s.style.top = e.pageY + 'px';\n    document.body.appendChild(s);\n    setTimeout(() => s.remove(), 800);\n  });\n\n  // music toggle\n  const audio = document.getElementById('bgMusic');\n  const btn = document.getElementById('musicBtn');\n  let playing = false;\n  btn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n    if (playing) { audio.pause(); btn.textContent = '🎵'; }\n    else { audio.play(); btn.textContent = '⏸'; }\n    playing = !playing;\n  });\n\n  // theme palette\n  const themes = {\n    'Sky Blue':   { bg1:'#e0f2f7',bg2:'#87ceeb',bg3:'#5dade2',title:'#1976d2',subtitle:'#3a7ca5',text:'#1a3a4a',heading:'#1565c0',tag1:'#b3e5fc',tag2:'#4fc3f7','tag-hover':'#1e88e5',accent:'#42a5f5','accent-dark':'#1976d2',border:'#87ceeb',swatch:'#87ceeb' },\n    'Rose Pink':  { bg1:'#fce4ec',bg2:'#f8bbd0',bg3:'#f48fb1',title:'#c2185b',subtitle:'#8e4162',text:'#4a2040',heading:'#ad1457',tag1:'#f8bbd0',tag2:'#f48fb1','tag-hover':'#e91e63',accent:'#e91e63','accent-dark':'#c2185b',border:'#f8bbd0',swatch:'#f48fb1' },\n    'Lavender':   { bg1:'#f3e5f5',bg2:'#ce93d8',bg3:'#ab47bc',title:'#7b1fa2',subtitle:'#8e6b99',text:'#3a1a4a',heading:'#6a1b9a',tag1:'#e1bee7',tag2:'#ce93d8','tag-hover':'#9c27b0',accent:'#ba68c8','accent-dark':'#7b1fa2',border:'#ce93d8',swatch:'#ce93d8' },\n    'Mint Green': { bg1:'#e8f5e9',bg2:'#a5d6a7',bg3:'#66bb6a',title:'#2e7d32',subtitle:'#5a8a5e',text:'#1b3a1e',heading:'#388e3c',tag1:'#c8e6c9',tag2:'#81c784','tag-hover':'#43a047',accent:'#66bb6a','accent-dark':'#2e7d32',border:'#a5d6a7',swatch:'#81c784' },\n    'Sunset':     { bg1:'#fff3e0',bg2:'#ffcc80',bg3:'#ffa726',title:'#e65100',subtitle:'#a67040',text:'#4a2800',heading:'#ef6c00',tag1:'#ffe0b2',tag2:'#ffb74d','tag-hover':'#f57c00',accent:'#ffa726','accent-dark':'#e65100',border:'#ffcc80',swatch:'#ffb74d' },\n    'Cherry Red': { bg1:'#ffebee',bg2:'#ef9a9a',bg3:'#ef5350',title:'#c62828',subtitle:'#a05050',text:'#4a1a1a',heading:'#d32f2f',tag1:'#ffcdd2',tag2:'#ef9a9a','tag-hover':'#e53935',accent:'#ef5350','accent-dark':'#c62828',border:'#ef9a9a',swatch:'#ef5350' },\n  };\n\n  const themeHearts = {\n    'Sky Blue':'💙','Rose Pink':'💗','Lavender':'💜','Mint Green':'💚','Sunset':'🧡','Cherry Red':'❤️'\n  };\n\n  function applyTheme(name) {\n    const t = themes[name]; if (!t) return;\n    const r = document.documentElement.style;\n    Object.keys(t).forEach(k => { if (k !== 'swatch') r.setProperty('--' + k, t[k]); });\n    localStorage.setItem('theme', name);\n    document.querySelectorAll('.palette-option').forEach(el => el.classList.toggle('active', el.dataset.name === name));\n    updateFloats(name);\n    document.getElementById('titleHeart').textContent = themeHearts[name] || '💙';\n    document.getElementById('footerHeart').textContent = themeHearts[name] || '💙';\n    document.title = 'Kirsty & Jet ' + (themeHearts[name] || '💙');\n    const h = themeHearts[name] || '💙';\n    document.getElementById('addBucketBtn').textContent = 'Add ' + h;\n    document.getElementById('addEventBtn').textContent = 'Add ' + h;\n  }\n\n  const panel = document.getElementById('palettePanel');\n  Object.keys(themes).forEach(name => {\n    const b = document.createElement('button');\n    b.className = 'palette-option';\n    b.dataset.name = name;\n    b.innerHTML = `<span class=\"palette-swatch\" style=\"background:${themes[name].swatch}\"></span>${name}`;\n    b.onclick = () => applyTheme(name);\n    panel.appendChild(b);\n  });\n\n  document.getElementById('paletteBtn').addEventListener('click', () => panel.classList.toggle('open'));\n  applyTheme(localStorage.getItem('theme') || 'Sky Blue');\n</script>\n\n</body>\n</html>"
                  }

                "command": "create",

                "file_text": "@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Dancing+Script:wght@500;700&family=Quicksand:wght@400;600&display=swap');\n\n* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }\n\n:root {\n  --bg1: #e0f2f7; --bg2: #87ceeb; --bg3: #5dade2;\n  --title: #1976d2; --subtitle: #3a7ca5; --text: #1a3a4a;\n  --heading: #1565c0;\n  --tag1: #b3e5fc; --tag2: #4fc3f7; --tag-hover: #1e88e5;\n  --accent: #42a5f5; --accent-dark: #1976d2;\n  --border: #87ceeb;\n}\n\nbody {\n  font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif;\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--bg1), var(--bg2), var(--bg3));\n  min-height: 100vh;\n  color: var(--text);\n  overflow-x: hidden;\n}\n\n/* Floating hearts */\n.hearts { position: fixed; width: 100%; height: 100%; pointer-events: none; z-index: 0; overflow: hidden; }\n.heart {\n  position: absolute;\n  font-size: 1.4rem;\n  opacity: 0.25;\n  animation: floatUp linear infinite;\n}\n@keyframes floatUp {\n  0% { transform: translateY(100vh) rotate(0deg); opacity: 0.25; }\n  100% { transform: translateY(-10vh) rotate(360deg); opacity: 0; }\n}\n\n/* Layout */\n.container { position: relative; z-index: 1; max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 2rem 1.2rem 4rem; }\n\n/* Header */\nheader { text-align: center; padding: 3rem 0 2rem; }\nheader h1 {\n  font-family: 'Dancing Script', cursive;\n  font-size: 3.2rem;\n  color: var(--title);\n  text-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(25,118,210,.15);\n}\nheader p { margin-top: .5rem; font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--subtitle); }\n\n/* Glass sections */\nsection {\n  background: rgba(255,255,255,.2);\n  backdrop-filter: blur(16px);\n  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px);\n  border-radius: 20px;\n  padding: 2rem;\n  margin: 1.8rem 0;\n  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.08);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.4);\n}\nsection h2 {\n  font-family: 'Dancing Script', cursive;\n  font-size: 2rem;\n  color: var(--heading);\n  margin-bottom: 1rem;\n  text-align: center;\n}\n\n/* Interest tags */\n.tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .6rem; justify-content: center; }\n.tag {\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--tag1), var(--tag2));\n  color: #fff;\n  padding: .5rem 1.2rem;\n  border-radius: 50px;\n  font-size: .95rem;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  cursor: default;\n  transition: transform .25s, box-shadow .25s, background .3s;\n}\n.tag:hover {\n  transform: scale(1.12) translateY(-3px);\n  box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.15);\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--tag2), var(--tag-hover));\n}\n\n/* Bucket list */\n.bucket-list { list-style: none; }\n.bucket-list li {\n  padding: .7rem 0;\n  border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--border);\n  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .6rem; font-size: 1.05rem;\n}\n.bucket-list li:last-child { border-bottom: none; }\n.bucket-list .heart-btn { background: none; border: none; font-size: 1.3rem; cursor: pointer; transition: transform .2s; }\n.bucket-list .heart-btn:hover { transform: scale(1.3); }\n.bucket-list .action-btn { background: none; border: none; font-size: 1rem; cursor: pointer; opacity: .5; transition: opacity .2s; }\n.bucket-list .action-btn:hover { opacity: 1; }\n.bucket-list li.done span { text-decoration: line-through; opacity: .5; }\n\n/* Add item / event inputs */\n.add-item, .add-event { display: flex; gap: .5rem; margin-top: 1rem; }\n.add-item input, .add-event input {\n  flex: 1; padding: .5rem .8rem; border: 2px solid var(--border); border-radius: 50px;\n  font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; font-size: .95rem; outline: none;\n}\n.add-item input:focus, .add-event input:focus { border-color: var(--accent); }\n.add-item button, .add-event button {\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-dark)); color: #fff; border: none;\n  padding: .5rem 1.2rem; border-radius: 50px; font-size: .95rem; cursor: pointer;\n  font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; font-weight: 600;\n}\n\n/* Calendar */\n.calendar-nav { display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; }\n.calendar-nav button {\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-dark)); color: #fff;\n  border: none; width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; font-size: 1.1rem; cursor: pointer;\n}\n.calendar-nav span { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 600; min-width: 160px; text-align: center; }\n.calendar-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(7,1fr); gap: 4px; text-align: center; }\n.calendar-grid .day-label { font-size: .75rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--subtitle); padding: .3rem 0; }\n.calendar-grid .day {\n  padding: .4rem; border-radius: 10px; font-size: .85rem; cursor: pointer;\n  transition: background .2s; position: relative; min-height: 38px;\n  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;\n}\n.calendar-grid .day:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,.06); }\n.calendar-grid .day.today { font-weight: 700; outline: 2px solid var(--accent); border-radius: 10px; }\n.calendar-grid .day.has-event { background: var(--tag1); font-weight: 600; }\n.calendar-grid .day.has-event::after {\n  content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 4px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);\n  width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--accent-dark);\n}\n.calendar-grid .day.empty { cursor: default; }\n.event-list { margin-top: 1rem; }\n.event-list h3 { font-size: .95rem; color: var(--heading); margin-bottom: .4rem; }\n.event-item {\n  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .5rem; padding: .35rem 0;\n  border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--border); font-size: .9rem;\n}\n.event-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }\n\n/* Fixed buttons */\n.music-btn {\n  position: fixed; bottom: 1.5rem; right: 1.5rem;\n  width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 50%; border: none;\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-dark));\n  color: #fff; font-size: 1.5rem; cursor: pointer;\n  box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.2);\n  z-index: 10; transition: transform .2s;\n}\n.music-btn:hover { transform: scale(1.1); }\n\n.palette-btn {\n  position: fixed; bottom: 1.5rem; left: 1.5rem;\n  width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 50%; border: none;\n  background: conic-gradient(#e91e63,#ff9800,#4caf50,#2196f3,#9c27b0,#e91e63);\n  font-size: 1.5rem; cursor: pointer;\n  box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.2);\n  z-index: 10; transition: transform .2s;\n}\n.palette-btn:hover { transform: scale(1.1); }\n\n/* Palette panel */\n.palette-panel {\n  position: fixed; bottom: 5rem; left: 1.5rem;\n  background: rgba(255,255,255,.92); backdrop-filter: blur(10px);\n  border-radius: 16px; padding: .8rem;\n  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.15);\n  z-index: 10; display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: .3rem;\n}\n.palette-panel.open { display: flex; }\n.palette-option {\n  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .5rem;\n  padding: .45rem .7rem; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer;\n  border: 2px solid transparent; transition: border-color .2s; background: none;\n  font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; font-size: .9rem; font-weight: 600;\n}\n.palette-option:hover { border-color: #aaa; }\n.palette-option.active { border-color: #333; }\n.palette-swatch {\n  width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid rgba(0,0,0,.1); flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n/* Sparkle cursor */\n.sparkle {\n  position: absolute; pointer-events: none; font-size: 1rem; z-index: 99;\n  animation: sparkleFade .8s ease-out forwards;\n}\n@keyframes sparkleFade {\n  0% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1) translate(0,0); }\n  100% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0) translate(0,-30px); }\n}\n\n/* Footer */\nfooter { text-align: center; padding: 2rem 0 1rem; font-size: .9rem; color: var(--title); }\n\n/* Responsive */\n@media (max-width: 600px) {\n  header h1 { font-size: 2.2rem; }\n  section { padding: 1.4rem; margin: 1.2rem 0; }\n  section h2 { font-size: 1.5rem; }\n  .tag { font-size: .85rem; padding: .4rem .9rem; }\n  .container { padding: 1rem .8rem 3rem; }\n}\n",
                "summary": "Create separated CSS file"
              },

                "command": "create",

font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--subtitle); }\n\n/* Glass sections */\nsection {\n  background: rgba(255,255,255,.2);\n  backdrop-filter: blur(16px);\n  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px);\n  border-radius: 20px;\n  padding: 2rem;\n  margin: 1.8rem 0;\n  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.08);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.4);\n}\nsection h2 {\n  font-family: 'Dancing Script', cursive;\n  font-size: 2rem;\n  color: var(--heading);\n  margin-bottom: 1rem;\n  text-align: center;\n}\n\n/* Interest tags */\n.tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .6rem; justify-content: center; }\n.tag {\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--tag1), var(--tag2));\n  color: #fff;\n  padding: .5rem 1.2rem;\n  border-radius: 50px;\n  font-size: .95rem;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  cursor: default;\n  transition: transform .25s, box-shadow .25s, background .3s;\n}\n.tag:hover {\n  transform: scale(1.12) translateY(-3px);\n  box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.15);\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--tag2), var(--tag-hover));\n}\n\n/* Bucket list */\n.bucket-list { list-style: none; }\n.bucket-list li {\n  padding: .7rem 0;\n  border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--border);\n  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .6rem; font-size: 1.05rem;\n}\n.bucket-list li:last-child { border-bottom: none; }\n.bucket-list .heart-btn { background: none; border: none; font-size: 1.3rem; cursor: pointer; transition: transform .2s; }\n.bucket-list .heart-btn:hover { transform: scale(1.3); }\n.bucket-list .action-btn { background: none; border: none; font-size: 1rem; cursor: pointer; opacity: .5; transition: opacity .2s; }\n.bucket-list .action-btn:hover { opacity: 1; }\n.bucket-list li.done span { text-decoration: line-through; opacity: .5; }\n\n/* Add item / event inputs */\n.add-item, .add-event { display: flex; gap: .5rem; margin-top: 1rem; }\n.add-item input, .add-event input {\n  flex: 1; padding: .5rem .8rem; border: 2px solid var(--border); border-radius: 50px;\n  font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; font-size: .95rem; outline: none;\n}\n.add-item input:focus, .add-event input:focus { border-color: var(--accent); }\n.add-item button, .add-event button {\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-dark)); color: #fff; border: none;\n  padding: .5rem 1.2rem; border-radius: 50px; font-size: .95rem; cursor: pointer;\n  font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; font-weight: 600;\n}\n\n/* Calendar */\n.calendar-nav { display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; }\n.calendar-nav button {\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-dark)); color: #fff;\n  border: none; width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; font-size: 1.1rem; cursor: pointer;\n}\n.calendar-nav span { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 600; min-width: 160px; text-align: center; }\n.calendar-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(7,1fr); gap: 4px; text-align: center; }\n.calendar-grid .day-label { font-size: .75rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--subtitle); padding: .3rem 0; }\n.calendar-grid .day {\n  padding: .4rem; border-radius: 10px; font-size: .85rem; cursor: pointer;\n  transition: background .2s; position: relative; min-height: 38px;\n  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;\n}\n.calendar-grid .day:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,.06); }\n.calendar-grid .day.today { font-weight: 700; outline: 2px solid var(--accent); border-radius: 10px; }\n.calendar-grid .day.has-event { background: var(--tag1); font-weight: 600; }\n.calendar-grid .day.has-event::after {\n  content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 4px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);\n  width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--accent-dark);\n}\n.calendar-grid .day.empty { cursor: default; }\n.event-list { margin-top: 1rem; }\n.event-list h3 { font-size: .95rem; color: var(--heading); margin-bottom: .4rem; }\n.event-item {\n  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .5rem; padding: .35rem 0;\n  border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--border); font-size: .9rem;\n}\n.event-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }\n\n/* Fixed buttons */\n.music-btn {\n  position: fixed; bottom: 1.5rem; right: 1.5rem;\n  width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 50%; border: none;\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-dark));\n  color: #fff; font-size: 1.5rem; cursor: pointer;\n  box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.2);\n  z-index: 10; transition: transform .2s;\n}\n.music-btn:hover { transform: scale(1.1); }\n\n.palette-btn {\n  position: fixed; bottom: 1.5rem; left: 1.5rem;\n  width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 50%; border: none;\n  background: conic-gradient(#e91e63,#ff9800,#4caf50,#2196f3,#9c27b0,#e91e63);\n  font-size: 1.5rem; cursor: pointer;\n  box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.2);\n  z-index: 10; transition: transform .2s;\n}\n.palette-btn:hover { transform: scale(1.1); }\n\n/* Palette panel */\n.palette-panel {\n  position: fixed; bottom: 5rem; left: 1.5rem;\n  background: rgba(255,255,255,.92); backdrop-filter: blur(10px);\n  border-radius: 16px; padding: .8rem;\n  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.15);\n  z-index: 10; display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: .3rem;\n}\n.palette-panel.open { display: flex; }\n.palette-option {\n  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .5rem;\n  padding: .45rem .7rem; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer;\n  border: 2px solid transparent; transition: border-color .2s; background: none;\n  font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; font-size: .9rem; font-weight: 600;\n}\n.palette-option:hover { border-color: #aaa; }\n.palette-option.active { border-color: #333; }\n.palette-swatch {\n  width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid rgba(0,0,0,.1); flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n/* Sparkle cursor */\n.sparkle {\n  position: absolute; pointer-events: none; font-size: 1rem; z-index: 99;\n  animation: sparkleFade .8s ease-out forwards;\n}\n@keyframes sparkleFade {\n  0% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1) translate(0,0); }\n  100% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0) translate(0,-30px); }\n}\n\n/* Footer */\nfooter { text-align: center; padding: 2rem 0 1rem; font-size: .9rem; color: var(--title); }\n\n/* Responsive */\n@media (max-width: 600px) {\n  header h1 { font-size: 2.2rem; }\n  section { padding: 1.4rem; margin: 1.2rem 0; }\n  section h2 { font-size: 1.5rem; }\n  .tag { font-size: .85rem; padding: .4rem .9rem; }\n  .container { padding: 1rem .8rem 3rem; }\n}\n",
                "summary": "Create separated CSS file"
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      },

                "file_text": "// ── Theme Data ──\nconst themes = {\n  'Sky Blue':   { bg1:'#e0f2f7',bg2:'#87ceeb',bg3:'#5dade2',title:'#1976d2',subtitle:'#3a7ca5',text:'#1a3a4a',heading:'#1565c0',tag1:'#b3e5fc',tag2:'#4fc3f7','tag-hover':'#1e88e5',accent:'#42a5f5','accent-dark':'#1976d2',border:'#87ceeb',swatch:'#87ceeb' },\n  'Rose Pink':  { bg1:'#fce4ec',bg2:'#f8bbd0',bg3:'#f48fb1',title:'#c2185b',subtitle:'#8e4162',text:'#4a2040',heading:'#ad1457',tag1:'#f8bbd0',tag2:'#f48fb1','tag-hover':'#e91e63',accent:'#e91e63','accent-dark':'#c2185b',border:'#f8bbd0',swatch:'#f48fb1' },\n  'Lavender':   { bg1:'#f3e5f5',bg2:'#ce93d8',bg3:'#ab47bc',title:'#7b1fa2',subtitle:'#8e6b99',text:'#3a1a4a',heading:'#6a1b9a',tag1:'#e1bee7',tag2:'#ce93d8','tag-hover':'#9c27b0',accent:'#ba68c8','accent-dark':'#7b1fa2',border:'#ce93d8',swatch:'#ce93d8' },\n  'Mint Green': { bg1:'#e8f5e9',bg2:'#a5d6a7',bg3:'#66bb6a',title:'#2e7d32',subtitle:'#5a8a5e',text:'#1b3a1e',heading:'#388e3c',tag1:'#c8e6c9',tag2:'#81c784','tag-hover':'#43a047',accent:'#66bb6a','accent-dark':'#2e7d32',border:'#a5d6a7',swatch:'#81c784' },\n  'Sunset':     { bg1:'#fff3e0',bg2:'#ffcc80',bg3:'#ffa726',title:'#e65100',subtitle:'#a67040',text:'#4a2800',heading:'#ef6c00',tag1:'#ffe0b2',tag2:'#ffb74d','tag-hover':'#f57c00',accent:'#ffa726','accent-dark':'#e65100',border:'#ffcc80',swatch:'#ffb74d' },\n  'Cherry Red': { bg1:'#ffebee',bg2:'#ef9a9a',bg3:'#ef5350',title:'#c62828',subtitle:'#a05050',text:'#4a1a1a',heading:'#d32f2f',tag1:'#ffcdd2',tag2:'#ef9a9a','tag-hover':'#e53935',accent:'#ef5350','accent-dark':'#c62828',border:'#ef9a9a',swatch:'#ef5350' },\n};\n\nconst themeHearts = {\n  'Sky Blue':'💙','Rose Pink':'💗','Lavender':'💜','Mint Green':'💚','Sunset':'🧡','Cherry Red':'❤️'\n};\n\nconst themeEmojis = {\n  'Sky Blue':   { sparkles: ['💙','✨','🩵','⭐'], floats: ['💙','🩵','💎','🫧','☁️'] },\n  'Rose Pink':  { sparkles: ['💗','✨','💕','⭐'], floats: ['💕','💗','💖','♥','🩷'] },\n  'Lavender':   { sparkles: ['💜','✨','🔮','⭐'], floats: ['💜','🪻','🔮','☁️','✨'] },\n  'Mint Green': { sparkles: ['💚','✨','🍀','⭐'], floats: ['💚','🌿','🍃','🌱','✨'] },\n  'Sunset':     { sparkles: ['🧡','✨','🌟','⭐'], floats: ['🧡','🌅','☀️','✨','🌻'] },\n  'Cherry Red': { sparkles: ['❤️','✨','♥','⭐'], floats: ['❤️','♥','🌹','✨','❣️'] },\n};\n\nlet currentSparkles = themeEmojis['Sky Blue'].sparkles;\n\n// ── Floating Hearts ──\nconst heartsContainer = document.getElementById('hearts');\nconst defaultFloats = themeEmojis['Sky Blue'].floats;\n\nfor (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) {\n  const s = document.createElement('span');\n  s.className = 'heart';\n  s.textContent = defaultFloats[i % defaultFloats.length];\n  s.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + '%';\n  s.style.animationDuration = 6 + Math.random() * 8 + 's';\n  s.style.animationDelay = Math.random() * 10 + 's';\n  heartsContainer.appendChild(s);\n}\n\nfunction updateFloats(name) {\n  const e = themeEmojis[name]?.floats || defaultFloats;\n  heartsContainer.querySelectorAll('.heart').forEach((h, i) => h.textContent = e[i % e.length]);\n  currentSparkles = themeEmojis[name]?.sparkles || themeEmojis['Sky Blue'].sparkles;\n}\n\n// ── Theme Switcher ──\nfunction applyTheme(name) {\n  const t = themes[name]; if (!t) return;\n  const r = document.documentElement.style;\n  Object.keys(t).forEach(k => { if (k !== 'swatch') r.setProperty('--' + k, t[k]); });\n  localStorage.setItem('theme', name);\n  document.querySelectorAll('.palette-option').forEach(el => el.classList.toggle('active', el.dataset.name === name));\n  updateFloats(name);\n  const h = themeHearts[name] || '💙';\n  document.getElementById('titleHeart').textContent = h;\n  document.getElementById('footerHeart').textContent = h;\n  document.title = 'Kirsty & Jet ' + h;\n  document.getElementById('addBucketBtn').textContent = 'Add ' + h;\n  document.getElementById('addEventBtn').textContent = 'Add ' + h;\n}\n\nconst panel = document.getElementById('palettePanel');\nObject.keys(themes).forEach(name => {\n  const b = document.createElement('button');\n  b.className = 'palette-option';\n  b.dataset.name = name;\n  b.innerHTML = `<span class=\"palette-swatch\" style=\"background:${themes[name].swatch}\"></span>${name}`;\n  b.onclick = () => applyTheme(name);\n  panel.appendChild(b);\n});\n\ndocument.getElementById('paletteBtn').addEventListener('click', () => panel.classList.toggle('open'));\napplyTheme(localStorage.getItem('theme') || 'Sky Blue');\n\n// ── Bucket List ──\nconst defaults = [\n  'Watch the Northern Lights together',\n  'Travel to Japan during cherry blossom season',\n  'Learn to cook a new dish every month',\n  'Go stargazing in the mountains',\n  'Build a blanket fort and binge-watch our fave series',\n  'Ride a hot air balloon',\n  'Write letters to our future selves',\n  'Adopt a pet together'\n];\nlet bucketData = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('bucketList')) ||\n  defaults.map(t => ({ text: t, done: false }));\n\nfunction saveBucket() { localStorage.setItem('bucketList', JSON.stringify(bucketData)); }\n\nfunction renderBucket() {\n  const ul = document.getElementById('bucketList');\n  ul.innerHTML = '';\n  bucketData.forEach((item, i) => {\n    const li = document.createElement('li');\n    if (item.done) li.classList.add('done');\n    li.innerHTML = `<button class=\"heart-btn\" onclick=\"toggleDone(${i})\">${item.done ? '❤️' : '🤍'}</button><span>${item.text}</span><button class=\"action-btn\" onclick=\"editItem(${i})\" title=\"Edit\">✏️</button><button class=\"action-btn\" onclick=\"deleteItem(${i})\" title=\"Delete\">🗑️</button>`;\n    ul.appendChild(li);\n  });\n}\n\nfunction toggleDone(i) { bucketData[i].done = !bucketData[i].done; saveBucket(); renderBucket(); }\n\nfunction addItem() {\n  const input = document.getElementById('newItem');\n  const text = input.value.trim();\n  if (!text) return;\n  bucketData.push({ text, done: false });\n  input.value = '';\n  saveBucket(); renderBucket();\n}\n\nfunction editItem(i) {\n  const newText = prompt('Edit this dream:', bucketData[i].text);\n  if (newText !== null && newText.trim()) {\n    bucketData[i].text = newText.trim();\n    saveBucket(); renderBucket();\n  }\n}\n\nfunction deleteItem(i) {\n  if (confirm('Remove \"' + bucketData[i].text + '\" from the list?')) {\n    bucketData.splice(i, 1);\n    saveBucket(); renderBucket();\n  }\n}\n\ndocument.getElementById('newItem').addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') addItem(); });\nrenderBucket();\n\n// ── Calendar ──\nlet calDate = new Date();\nlet selectedDate = null;\nlet calEvents = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('calEvents')) || {};\n\nfunction saveEvents() { localStorage.setItem('calEvents', JSON.stringify(calEvents)); }\n\nfunction renderCal() {\n  const y = calDate.getFullYear(), m = calDate.getMonth();\n  document.getElementById('calMonth').textContent = calDate.toLocaleString('default', { month: 'long', year: 'numeric' });\n  const grid = document.getElementById('calGrid');\n  grid.innerHTML = '';\n  ['Sun','Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat'].forEach(d => {\n    const el = document.createElement('div'); el.className = 'day-label'; el.textContent = d; grid.appendChild(el);\n  });\n  const first = new Date(y, m, 1).getDay(), days = new Date(y, m + 1, 0).getDate();\n  const today = new Date();\n  for (let i = 0; i < first; i++) { const el = document.createElement('div'); el.className = 'day empty'; grid.appendChild(el); }\n  for (let d = 1; d <= days; d++) {\n    const el = document.createElement('div');\n    const key = `${y}-${String(m + 1).padStart(2, '0')}-${String(d).padStart(2, '0')}`;\n    el.className = 'day';\n    if (d === today.getDate() && m === today.getMonth() && y === today.getFullYear()) el.classList.add('today');\n    if (calEvents[key]?.length) el.classList.add('has-event');\n    el.textContent = d;\n    el.onclick = () => { selectedDate = key; renderEvents(); };\n    grid.appendChild(el);\n  }\n  if (selectedDate) renderEvents();\n}\n\nfunction renderEvents() {\n  const el = document.getElementById('eventList');\n  if (!selectedDate) { el.innerHTML = ''; return; }\n  const evts = calEvents[selectedDate] || [];\n  el.innerHTML = `<h3>${selectedDate}</h3>` +\n    (evts.length ? evts.map((e, i) => `<div class=\"event-item\"><span>${e}</span><button class=\"action-btn\" onclick=\"deleteEvent('${selectedDate}',${i})\" title=\"Delete\">🗑️</button></div>`).join('') : '<div style=\"font-size:.85rem;opacity:.6\">No events yet</div>');\n}\n\nfunction addEvent() {\n  if (!selectedDate) { alert('Pick a date on the calendar first!'); return; }\n  const input = document.getElementById('newEvent');\n  const text = input.value.trim();\n  if (!text) return;\n  if (!calEvents[selectedDate]) calEvents[selectedDate] = [];\n  calEvents[selectedDate].push(text);\n  input.value = '';\n  saveEvents(); renderCal();\n}\n\nfunction deleteEvent(key, i) {\n  calEvents[key].splice(i, 1);\n  if (!calEvents[key].length) delete calEvents[key];\n  saveEvents(); renderCal();\n}\n\nfunction changeMonth(dir) { calDate.setMonth(calDate.getMonth() + dir); selectedDate = null; renderCal(); }\n\ndocument.getElementById('newEvent').addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') addEvent(); });\nrenderCal();\n\n// ── Cursor Sparkle ──\ndocument.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {\n  const s = document.createElement('span');\n  s.className = 'sparkle';\n  s.textContent = currentSparkles[Math.random() * 4 | 0];\n  s.style.left = e.pageX + 'px';\n  s.style.top = e.pageY + 'px';\n  document.body.appendChild(s);\n  setTimeout(() => s.remove(), 800);\n});\n\n// ── Music Toggle ──\nconst audio = document.getElementById('bgMusic');\nconst musicBtn = document.getElementById('musicBtn');\nlet playing = false;\nmusicBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n  if (playing) { audio.pause(); musicBtn.textContent = '🎵'; }\n  else { audio.play(); musicBtn.textContent = '⏸'; }\n  playing = !playing;\n});\n",

                "summary": "Create separated JavaScript file"
              },

});\nrenderBucket();\n\n// ── Calendar ──\nlet calDate = new Date();\nlet selectedDate = null;\nlet calEvents = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('calEvents')) || {};\n\nfunction saveEvents() { localStorage.setItem('calEvents', JSON.stringify(calEvents)); }\n\nfunction renderCal() {\n  const y = calDate.getFullYear(), m = calDate.getMonth();\n  document.getElementById('calMonth').textContent = calDate.toLocaleString('default', { month: 'long', year: 'numeric' });\n  const grid = document.getElementById('calGrid');\n  grid.innerHTML = '';\n  ['Sun','Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat'].forEach(d => {\n    const el = document.createElement('div'); el.className = 'day-label'; el.textContent = d; grid.appendChild(el);\n  });\n  const first = new Date(y, m, 1).getDay(), days = new Date(y, m + 1, 0).getDate();\n  const today = new Date();\n  for (let i = 0; i < first; i++) { const el = document.createElement('div'); el.className = 'day empty'; grid.appendChild(el); }\n  for (let d = 1; d <= days; d++) {\n    const el = document.createElement('div');\n    const key = `${y}-${String(m + 1).padStart(2, '0')}-${String(d).padStart(2, '0')}`;\n    el.className = 'day';\n    if (d === today.getDate() && m === today.getMonth() && y === today.getFullYear()) el.classList.add('today');\n    if (calEvents[key]?.length) el.classList.add('has-event');\n    el.textContent = d;\n    el.onclick = () => { selectedDate = key; renderEvents(); };\n    grid.appendChild(el);\n  }\n  if (selectedDate) renderEvents();\n}\n\nfunction renderEvents() {\n  const el = document.getElementById('eventList');\n  if (!selectedDate) { el.innerHTML = ''; return; }\n  const evts = calEvents[selectedDate] || [];\n  el.innerHTML = `<h3>${selectedDate}</h3>` +\n    (evts.length ? evts.map((e, i) => `<div class=\"event-item\"><span>${e}</span><button class=\"action-btn\" onclick=\"deleteEvent('${selectedDate}',${i})\" title=\"Delete\">🗑️</button></div>`).join('') : '<div style=\"font-size:.85rem;opacity:.6\">No events yet</div>');\n}\n\nfunction addEvent() {\n  if (!selectedDate) { alert('Pick a date on the calendar first!'); return; }\n  const input = document.getElementById('newEvent');\n  const text = input.value.trim();\n  if (!text) return;\n  if (!calEvents[selectedDate]) calEvents[selectedDate] = [];\n  calEvents[selectedDate].push(text);\n  input.value = '';\n  saveEvents(); renderCal();\n}\n\nfunction deleteEvent(key, i) {\n  calEvents[key].splice(i, 1);\n  if (!calEvents[key].length) delete calEvents[key];\n  saveEvents(); renderCal();\n}\n\nfunction changeMonth(dir) { calDate.setMonth(calDate.getMonth() + dir); selectedDate = null; renderCal(); }\n\ndocument.getElementById('newEvent').addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') addEvent(); });\nrenderCal();\n\n// ── Cursor Sparkle ──\ndocument.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {\n  const s = document.createElement('span');\n  s.className = 'sparkle';\n  s.textContent = currentSparkles[Math.random() * 4 | 0];\n  s.style.left = e.pageX + 'px';\n  s.style.top = e.pageY + 'px';\n  document.body.appendChild(s);\n  setTimeout(() => s.remove(), 800);\n});\n\n// ── Music Toggle ──\nconst audio = document.getElementById('bgMusic');\nconst musicBtn = document.getElementById('musicBtn');\nlet playing = false;\nmusicBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n  if (playing) { audio.pause(); musicBtn.textContent = '🎵'; }\n  else { audio.play(); musicBtn.textContent = '⏸'; }\n  playing = !playing;\n});\n",
                "path": "/Users/erwin.c/Downloads/love-site/js/app.js",
                "summary": "Create separated JavaScript file"
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      },

              "orig_name": "fs_write",
              "args": {
                "command": "create",
                "file_text": "<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head>\n  <meta charset=\"UTF-8\">\n  <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\">\n  <title>Kirsty & Jet 💙</title>\n  <link rel=\"stylesheet\" href=\"css/style.css\">\n</head>\n<body>\n\n  <div class=\"hearts\" id=\"hearts\"></div>\n\n  <div class=\"container\">\n    <header>\n      <h1>Kirsty & Jet <span id=\"titleHeart\">💙</span></h1>\n      <p>A little corner of the internet, just for us.</p>\n    </header>\n\n    <section>\n      <h2>Our Interests 🌸</h2>\n      <div class=\"tags\">\n        <span class=\"tag\">🎬 Movies</span>\n        <span class=\"tag\">🍜 Food Trips</span>\n        <span class=\"tag\">🎵 Music</span>\n        <span class=\"tag\">📸 Photography</span>\n        <span class=\"tag\">🎮 Gaming</span>\n        <span class=\"tag\">☕ Coffee Dates</span>\n        <span class=\"tag\">🌅 Sunsets</span>\n        <span class=\"tag\">📚 Reading</span>\n        <span class=\"tag\">🌃 City Lights</span>\n        <span class=\"tag\">🎉 Sponty Events</span>\n        <span class=\"tag\">🚗 Roadtrips</span>\n      </div>\n    </section>\n\n    <section>\n      <h2>Our Bucket List 🪣✨</h2>\n      <ul class=\"bucket-list\" id=\"bucketList\"></ul>\n      <div class=\"add-item\">\n        <input type=\"text\" id=\"newItem\" placeholder=\"Add a new dream...\">\n        <button onclick=\"addItem()\" id=\"addBucketBtn\">Add 💙</button>\n      </div>\n    </section>\n\n    <section>\n      <h2>Our Calendar 📅</h2>\n      <div class=\"calendar-nav\">\n        <button onclick=\"changeMonth(-1)\">‹</button>\n        <span id=\"calMonth\"></span>\n        <button onclick=\"changeMonth(1)\">›</button>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"calendar-grid\" id=\"calGrid\"></div>\n      <div class=\"event-list\" id=\"eventList\"></div>\n      <div class=\"add-event\">\n        <input type=\"text\" id=\"newEvent\" placeholder=\"Add a date or event...\">\n        <button onclick=\"addEvent()\" id=\"addEventBtn\">Add 📅</button>\n      </div>\n    </section>\n\n    <footer>Made with <span id=\"footerHeart\">💙</span></footer>\n  </div>\n\n  <audio id=\"bgMusic\" loop>\n    <source src=\"assets/music.mp3\" type=\"audio/mpeg\">\n  </audio>\n\n  <button class=\"music-btn\" id=\"musicBtn\" title=\"Play/Pause Music\">🎵</button>\n  <button class=\"palette-btn\" id=\"paletteBtn\" title=\"Change Theme\">🎨</button>\n  <div class=\"palette-panel\" id=\"palettePanel\"></div>\n\n  <script src=\"js/app.js\"></script>\n</body>\n</html>\n",
                "path": "/Users/erwin.c/Downloads/love-site/index.html",
                "summary": "Rewrite index.html to link external CSS and JS files"
              },
              "orig_args": {
                "command": "create",
                "file_text": "<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head>\n  <meta charset=\"UTF-8\">\n  <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\">\n  <title>Kirsty & Jet 💙</title>\n  <link rel=\"stylesheet\" href=\"css/style.css\">\n</head>\n<body>\n\n  <div class=\"hearts\" id=\"hearts\"></div>\n\n  <div class=\"container\">\n    <header>\n      <h1>Kirsty & Jet <span id=\"titleHeart\">💙</span></h1>\n      <p>A little corner of the internet, just for us.</p>\n    </header>\n\n    <section>\n      <h2>Our Interests 🌸</h2>\n      <div class=\"tags\">\n        <span class=\"tag\">🎬 Movies</span>\n        <span class=\"tag\">🍜 Food Trips</span>\n        <span class=\"tag\">🎵 Music</span>\n        <span class=\"tag\">📸 Photography</span>\n        <span Bucket List 🪣✨</h2>\n      <ul class=\"bucket-list\" id=\"bucketList\"></ul>\n      <div class=\"add-item\">\n        <input type=\"text\" id=\"newItem\" placeholder=\"Add a new dream...\">\n        <button onclick=\"addItem()\" id=\"addBucketBtn\">Add 💙</button>\n      </div>\n    </section>\n\n    <section>\n      <h2>Our Calendar 📅</h2>\n      <div class=\"calendar-nav\">\n        <button onclick=\"changeMonth(-1)\">‹</button>\n        <span id=\"calMonth\"></span>\n        <button onclick=\"changeMonth(1)\">›</button>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"calendar-grid\" id=\"calGrid\"></div>\n      <div class=\"event-list\" id=\"eventList\"></div>\n      <div class=\"add-event\">\n        <input type=\"text\" id=\"newEvent\" placeholder=\"Add a date or event...\">\n        <button onclick=\"addEvent()\" id=\"addEventBtn\">Add 📅</button>\n      </div>\n    </section>\n\n    <footer>Made with <span id=\"footerHeart\">💙</span></footer>\n  </div>\n\n  <audio id=\"bgMusic\" loop>\n    <source src=\"assets/music.mp3\" type=\"audio/mpeg\">\n  </audio>\n\n  <button class=\"music-btn\" id=\"musicBtn\" title=\"Play/Pause Music\">🎵</button>\n  <button class=\"palette-btn\" id=\"paletteBtn\" title=\"Change Theme\">🎨</button>\n  <div class=\"palette-panel\" id=\"palettePanel\"></div>\n\n  <script src=\"js/app.js\"></script>\n</body>\n</html>\n",
                "path": "/Users/erwin.c/Downloads/love-site/index.html",
                "summary": "Rewrite index.html to link external CSS and JS files"
              }
            }

      "assistant": {
        "ToolUse": {
          "message_id": "46aadf68-4c28-411a-908d-d1a1f17e0c03",
          "content": "",
          "tool_uses": [
            {
              "id": "tooluse_AXzrk4a0Kcr6cQepN7o1w3",
              "name": "fs_write",
              "orig_name": "fs_write",
              "args": {
                "command": "create",
                "file_text": "# Kirsty & Jet 💙\n\nA sweet, interactive couple's website with glassmorphism design, theme switching, and more.\n\n## Features\n\n- 🎨 6 color themes (Sky Blue, Rose Pink, Lavender, Mint Green, Sunset, Cherry Red)\n- 🌸 Shared interests section with hover effects\n- 🪣 Interactive bucket list (add, edit, delete, mark as done)\n- 📅 Calendar with event tracking\n- 🎵 Background music player\n- ✨ Cursor sparkle effects\n- 💙 Floating emoji animations\n- 📱 Fully responsive design\n- 💾 All data saved to localStorage\n\n## Project Structure\n\n```\nlove-site/\n├── index.html          # Main HTML\n├── css/\n│   └── style.css       # All styles\n├── js/\n│   └── app.js          # All functionality\n├── assets/\n│   └── music.mp3       # Drop your music file here\n└── README.md\n```\n\n## Setup\n\n1. Drop your music file into `assets/` and rename it to `music.mp3`\n2. Open `index.html` in a browser — or host on GitHub Pages\n\n## Deploy to GitHub Pages\n\n1. Create a new repo on GitHub\n2. Push this folder:\n   ```bash\n   cd love-site\n   git init\n   git add .\n   git commit -m \"our little corner of the internet 💙\"\n   git branch -M main\n   git remote add origin https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/YOUR_REPO.git\n   git push -u origin main\n   ```\n3. Go to repo **Settings → Pages → Source → main branch → / (root)**\n4. Your site will be live at `https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/YOUR_REPO/`\n",
                "path": "/Users/erwin.c/Downloads/love-site/README.md",
                "summary": "Create README with project info and deploy instructions"
              },
              "orig_args": {
                "command": "create",
                "file_text": "# Kirsty & Jet 💙\n\nA sweet, interactive couple's website with glassmorphism design, theme switching, and more.\n\n## Features\n\n- 🎨 6 color themes (Sky Blue, Rose Pink, Lavender, Mint Green, Sunset, Cherry Red)\n- 🌸 Shared interests section with hover effects\n- 🪣 Interactive bucket list (add, edit, delete, mark as done)\n- 📅 Calendar with event tracking\n- 🎵 Background music player\n- ✨ Cursor sparkle effects\n- 💙 Floating emoji animations\n- 📱 Fully responsive design\n- 💾 All data saved to localStorage\n\n## Project Structure\n\n```\nlove-site/\n├── index.html          # Main HTML\n├── css/\n│   └── style.css       # All styles\n├── js/\n│   └── app.js          # All functionality\n├── assets/\n│   └── music.mp3       # Drop your music file here\n└── README.md\n```\n\n## Setup\n\n1. Drop your music file into `assets/` and rename it to `music.mp3`\n2. Open `index.html` in a browser — or host on GitHub Pages\n\n## Deploy to GitHub Pages\n\n1. Create a new repo on GitHub\n2. Push this folder:\n   ```bash\n   cd love-site\n   git init\n   git add .\n   git commit -m \"our little corner of the internet 💙\"\n   git branch -M main\n   git remote add origin https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/YOUR_REPO.git\n   git push -u origin main\n   ```\n3. Go to repo **Settings → Pages → Source → main branch → / (root)**\n4. Your site will be live at `https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/YOUR_REPO/`\n",
                "path": "/Users/erwin.c/Downloads/love-site/README.md",
                "summary": "Create README with project info and deploy instructions"
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      },

        "Response": {
          "message_id": "c1dff89d-cecd-4329-8751-92cef67340d9",
          "content": "All structured! Here's your project now:\n\n```\nlove-site/\n├── index.html          ← clean HTML only\n├── css/\n│   └── style.css       ← all styles\n├── js/\n│   └── app.js          ← all functionality\n├── assets/\n│   └── (music.mp3)     ← drop your music here\n└── README.md           ← setup & deploy guide\n```\n\nNote the music path changed to `assets/music.mp3`, so drop your audio file in the `assets/` folder now.\n\nTo deploy on GitHub Pages:\n1. Create a new repo on GitHub\n2. Run these in terminal:\n```bash\ncd ~/Downloads/love-site\ngit init\ngit add .\ngit commit -m \"our little corner of the internet 💙\"\ngit branch -M main\ngit remote add origin https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/YOUR_REPO.git\ngit push -u origin main\n```\n3. Go to repo Settings → Pages → Source → main branch\n4. Your site goes live at `https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/YOUR_REPO/`\n\nWant me to help you initialize the git repo right now?"
        }
      },

          "content": "\n\nHere are some ideas:\n\n- `kirsty-and-jet` — clean and simple\n- `our-little-corner` — matches the tagline on the site\n- `us-forever` — sweet and short\n- `love-page` — straightforward\n- `k-and-j` — minimal vibes\n\nIf you want it as your main GitHub Pages site, you could also name it `YOUR_USERNAME.github.io` and it'll be live at that URL directly.\n\nPick whichever feels right!         }

      "assistant": {
        "Response": {
          "message_id": "4a66aeae-c965-4e90-b6fa-86fb8cc28102",
          "content": "The commit is ready but GitHub needs authentication to push. You'll need to either:\n\n1. Use GitHub CLI (easiest):\n   ```bash\n   brew install gh\n   gh auth login\n   ```\n   Then run:\n   ```bash\n   cd ~/Downloads/love-site && git push -u origin main\n   ```\n\n2. Or use a Personal Access Token:\n   - Go to GitHub → Settings → Developer Settings → Personal Access Tokens → Generate new token\n   - Give it `repo` scope\n   - When prompted for password during push, paste the token instead\n\n3. Or set up SSH:\n   - Go to your repo page and switch the remote to SSH:\n   ```bash\n   git remote set-url origin git@github.com:Jerwin0210/our-little-corner.git\n   ```\n\nWhich method works best for you? Once pushed, go to repo Settings → Pages → Source → `main` branch and your site will be live at `https://jerwin0210.github.io/our-little-corner/` 💙"
        }
      },

      "assistant": {
        "ToolUse": {
          "message_id": "7db6f8da-610f-421d-b904-07483c7f4e2e",
          "content": "Now add the loader styles:",
          "tool_uses": [
            {
              "id": "tooluse_nVnVLUuztKq3JXENoQq1R9",
              "name": "fs_write",
              "orig_name": "fs_write",
              "args": {
                "command": "str_replace",
                "new_str": "/* Loader */\n.loader {\n  position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 999;\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--bg1), var(--bg2), var(--bg3));\n  display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;\n  transition: opacity .6s, visibility .6s;\n}\n.loader.hidden { opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; }\n.loader-heart {\n  font-size: 4rem;\n  animation: loaderPulse 1s ease-in-out infinite;\n}\n@keyframes loaderPulse {\n  0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }\n  50% { transform: scale(1.3); }\n}\n.loader-text {\n  font-family: 'Dancing Script', cursive;\n  font-size: 2rem;\n  color: var(--title);\n  margin-top: 1rem;\n  animation: loaderFade 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;\n}\n@keyframes loaderFade {\n  0%, 100% { opacity: .4; }\n  50% { opacity: 1; }\n}\n\n/* Floating hearts */",
                "old_str": "/* Floating hearts */",
                "path": "/Users/erwin.c/Downloads/love-site/css/style.css"
              },
              "orig_args": {
                "command": "str_replace",
                "new_str": "/* Loader */\n.loader {\n  position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 999;\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--bg1), var(--bg2), var(--bg3));\n  display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;\n  transition: opacity .6s, visibility .6s;\n}\n.loader.hidden { opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; }\n.loader-heart {\n  font-size: 4rem;\n  animation: loaderPulse 1s ease-in-out infinite;\n}\n@keyframes loaderPulse {\n  0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }\n  50% { transform: scale(1.3); }\n}\n.loader-text {\n  font-family: 'Dancing Script', cursive;\n  font-size: 2rem;\n  color: var(--title);\n  margin-top: 1rem;\n  animation: loaderFade 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;\n}\n@keyframes loaderFade {\n  0%, 100% { opacity: .4; }\n  50% { opacity: 1; }\n}\n\n/* Floating hearts */",
                "old_str": "/* Floating hearts */",
                "path": "/Users/erwin.c/Downloads/love-site/css/style.css"
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      },

          "message_id": "bfcfd213-dd48-48b1-9ea9-7d6145fc7f4d",
          "content": "Done! Now when you open the site you get a loading screen with:\n\n- 💙 A pulsing heart emoji (matches the active theme color)\n- \"Kirsty & Jet\" in cursive that gently fades in and out\n- Gradient background matching the theme\n- Smoothly fades away after 1.5 seconds\n\nRefresh the page to see it! Want me to adjust the duration or add anything else to the loader?"
        }
      },

              "args": {
                "command": "str_replace",
                "new_str": ".loader.hidden { opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; transform: scale(1.1); }\n.loader-heart {\n  font-size: 4rem;\n  animation: loaderPulse 1s ease-in-out infinite;\n}\n.loader.hidden .loader-heart {\n  animation: loaderBurst .6s ease-out forwards;\n}\n@keyframes loaderBurst {\n  0% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }\n  50% { transform: scale(2.5); opacity: .6; }\n  100% { transform: scale(4); opacity: 0; }\n}",
                "old_str": ".loader.hidden { opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; }\n.loader-heart {\n  font-size: 4rem;\n  animation: loaderPulse 1s ease-in-out infinite;\n}",

              },
